code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
let n = tokens.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    let key = "\n#{tok}\n"
    if not string.contains(seen, key)
      seen = "#{seen}#{tok}\n"
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
